| Main Path:               | _All steps will be numbered as unique and each step will contain a simple behavior._<br><br>1.<br><br>2.<br><br>3.<br><br>....                 |
| ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                            |
| Alternative Path:        | _Each step will be specified as alternative to which step in the main path and will be numbered as unique_<br><br>A.xx<br><br>A.yy<br><br>.... |
